name: open-risk-register
description: Free NIS2 risk assessment tool based on NIST SP 800-30 R1

scripts.build: esbuild src/js/app.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/bundle.js && esbuild src/js/site.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/site.js && esbuild src/js/pdf.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/pdf-bundle.js && esbuild src/css/main.css --bundle --minify --loader:.woff2=file --outfile=dist/style.css && esbuild src/css/site.css --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/site.css
scripts.dev: esbuild src/js/app.js --bundle --sourcemap --outfile=dist/bundle.js & esbuild src/js/site.js --bundle --sourcemap --outfile=dist/site.js & esbuild src/js/pdf.js --bundle --sourcemap --outfile=dist/pdf-bundle.js & esbuild src/css/main.css --bundle --loader:.woff2=file --outfile=dist/style.css & esbuild src/css/site.css --bundle --outfile=dist/site.css
